name: New Feature
description: Research, architect, build, design, test, and launch a new feature

parameters.label: Feature Name
parameters.placeholder: Name of the feature to build...

parameters.label: Feature Description
parameters.placeholder: Describe what this feature should do...

steps.task: Research the feature: {{feature_name}}. Description: {{feature_description}}. Target users: {{target_users}}
Build the {{feature_name}} feature based on the architecture. Description: {{feature_description}}
Design the UI/UX for {{feature_name}}. Target users: {{target_users}}
Test the {{feature_name}} feature thoroughly. Verify it meets requirements: {{feature_description}}
Plan go-to-market strategy for {{feature_name}}. Target users: {{target_users}}
